patch:
Index: app.py
===================================================================
--- app.py	
+++ app.py	
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+import os
+from flask import Flask, render_template, send_file
+
+app = Flask(__name__)
+
+INSTALLER_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "installer")
+
+
+@app.route("/")
+def index():
+    files = []
+    if os.path.isdir(INSTALLER_DIR):
+        files = [
+            f
+            for f in os.listdir(INSTALLER_DIR)
+            if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(INSTALLER_DIR, f))
+        ]
+    return render_template("index.html", files=files)
+
+
+@app.route("/download/<filename>")
+def download(filename):
+    return send_file(
+        os.path.join(INSTALLER_DIR, filename),
+        as_attachment=True,
+    )
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    os.makedirs(INSTALLER_DIR, exist_ok=True)
+    app.run(debug=True)
